_comment: SYNTHETIC fixture (hand-written, no real student data). shared.subject: math
shared.title: Discounts Lesson
shared.objective_text: Students will learn about percentages and discounts.
shared.prerequisite: Students should have some background in percentages.

rows: Students may get confused about percentages.

look_fors: Make sure students are on task.

blocks.label: Goal
blocks.text: Teach discounts. This lesson is well-structured.
Answer key: Q1 = 200, Q2 = 60. The teacher distributes calculators and circulates to check for misconceptions.
